title: Reverse Proxies, Forwarded Fields, Framing, and Request Smuggling Defense · Narrowing Workshop
summary: A backend pairing room predicts runtime, request, middleware, dependency, response, and cleanup transitions before assembling the first proxy hop, framing, and parser-consistency contract for reverse proxies, forwarded fields, framing, and request smuggling defense. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of proxy hop, framing, and parser-consistency contract while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, cau…
objectives: Strip and regenerate hop-by-hop fields per connection, control Host and authority, handle Connection-nominated fields, and document request and response rewriting.
Require trusted proxies to overwrite client-controlled Forwarded and X-Forwarded values and validate the observed hop count against every reachable topology.
Reject conflicting Content-Length, transfer-coding ambiguity, invalid field syntax, premature EOF, excess body, and front-end or origin disagreement.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Proxy Hop By Hop Fields
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop team handles case 7629 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reject untrusted topology, ambiguous framing, and insecure parser policy; distinguish proxy evidence from origin evidence; then remove one trusted proxy hop and recompute authority from the socket boundary. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Proxy Hop By Hop Fields.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for strip and regenerate hop-by-hop fields per connection, control host and authority, handle connection-nominated fields, and document request and response rewriting. For Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Proxy Hop By Hop Fields, keep Proxy Hop By Hop Fields connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
